projectDescription: A Discord music bot built with Nextcord and Wavelink that streams audio via Lavalink, featuring slash commands for playback control, queue management, and interactive rich embeds.
keyFeatures: Lavalink-powered audio streaming for stable, low-resource music playback
Slash command interface with 11 commands covering full playback lifecycle
Interactive paginated queue browser with session-locked navigation
Dynamic 'Now Playing' rich embeds that auto-update and clean up
Automated bot presence synced to current track with live timestamps
Playlist support — enqueue entire playlists from YouTube and other sources
Comprehensive pytest test suite with async support and watchdog mode
